question: Current department general manager (部门总经理) approval threshold for single expense reimbursement

applicable_policies.title: XX证券费用报销管理办法(2025修订版)

applicable_clauses.reason: Delegates all single-expense approval thresholds to 03_authorization_management.md Annex II. Does not specify amounts directly in this document.
applicable_clauses.text_summary: 单笔费用报销的审批权限,不在本办法正文列示具体金额,统一按《XX证券授权管理办法》附件二执行。费用系统应按附件二自动派生审批角色。
本办法自二〇二五年一月一日起施行。原《XX证券费用报销管理办法(2022版)》同时废止。

applicable_clauses.reason: Establishes that Annex II amounts are the currently effective approval lines for expense reimbursement system role derivation.
applicable_clauses.text_summary: 本办法附件二适用于费用报销系统自动派生审批角色,相关金额为现行有效审批线。

applicable_clauses.reason: Defines the department general manager (部门总经理) approval tier: single expense amount ≥ 10,000 yuan and < 50,000 yuan.
applicable_clauses.text_summary: AR-03: 大于等于10000元且小于50000元 → 部门总经理

applicable_clauses.reason: Effective date of the Authorization Management Rules: January 1, 2025.
applicable_clauses.text_summary: 本办法自二〇二五年一月一日起施行。

excluded_policies.title: XX证券费用报销管理办法(2022版)
excluded_policies.exclusion_reason: Explicitly deprecated. Article 1 states it is retained only as a historical record and the 2025 version governs. Article 4 states its approval amounts have been superseded and must not be used as a current basis. Article 14 of the 2025 version formally repealed it effective 2025-01-01.
excluded_policies.old_threshold_noted: Article 2 previously set department GM approval at ≥ 8,000 yuan — this is NOT applicable under current rules.

policy_relationships.description: 2025 expense rules delegate all approval amount thresholds to Authorization Management Annex II.
